bird.name: Saffron siskin
bird.summary: The saffron siskin (Spinus siemiradzkii) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru.

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 秘鲁
locations.summary: 秘（bì）魯共和國（西班牙語：República del Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw Ripuwlika；艾馬拉語：Piruwxa Ripuwlika），通称秘魯（西班牙語：Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw；艾馬拉語：Piruw），是南…

relations.subject: Saffron siskin
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat destruction and the IUCN has assessed it as being a "least concern species"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Saffron siskin
relations.evidence: The high rate of deforestation in the country adds to the likeliness of the threat that it faces
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
